hero.subheadline: I'm Justin, a Full-stack & 3D Web Developer. I specialize in building performant, scalable applications and immersive digital interfaces that solve complex problems with elegance.

showcase.title: Selected Work
showcase.subtitle: A collection of projects that challenge the boundaries of web development, from 3D visualizations to AI-powered platforms.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I believe that great software is born at the intersection of performance, maintainability, and user experience. My approach is rooted in a deep understanding of core principles rather than just chasing the latest frameworks.
about.p2: Whether I'm optimizing a 3D rendering pipeline for the web or designing a scalable backend architecture for an AI application, I prioritize writing clean, self-documenting code that stands the test of time.
